missions.name: Solar Flare Monitoring Buoy
missions.description: The heliophysics team's flare buoy is cooking in the sun-side orbit. EVA out and swap the ablative radiator panels before the electronics bake.

missions.name: Comms Relay Hardening
missions.description: A comms relay near perihelion needs a manual firmware flash — too much radiation noise for OTA. Dock, spacewalk, patch, extract.

missions.name: Orbital Asset Servicing
missions.description: On-orbit asset is throwing faults across multiple subsystems. Diagnostics inconclusive — EVA out, find the broken parts, patch them in place.

missions.name: Coronograph Phasing
missions.description: The sun-side coronograph drifted after the last CME. EVA, read the wavefront sensor, walk each mirror segment in by hand.
